project.description: A Claude Code Marketplace repository providing 7 production bundles with development standards, automation tools, and AI-assisted workflows for CUI Open Source projects. Contains skills, agents, and commands for Java, JavaScript, Python, OCI, documentation, requirements engineering, and plugin development.
project.description_reasoning: source: README.adoc introduction and module descriptions from derived-data

default.responsibility: Root project module providing Python build infrastructure via pyprojectx. Manages test execution, linting (ruff), type checking (mypy), and coverage for all marketplace bundles.
default.responsibility_reasoning: source: pyproject.toml and CLAUDE.md build commands
default.purpose_reasoning: Root project with pyprojectx wrapper managing child bundle builds

marketplace/bundles.description: Root directory containing all 7 production marketplace bundles

test.description: Pytest test suites organized by bundle name, mirroring marketplace/bundles structure

documentation.responsibility: Project-level documentation including build structure, architecture diagrams, and contributor guides.
documentation.responsibility_reasoning: source: doc/ directory contains project documentation
documentation.purpose_reasoning: Documentation-only module with no code artifacts

plan-marshall.responsibility: Core orchestration bundle providing the complete plan-based development workflow (phases 1-6), build system abstractions for Maven/Gradle/npm/Python, task management, architecture analysis, permission tooling, CI integration, and cross-cutting utilities like script execution, TOON format, and lessons learned.
plan-marshall.responsibility_reasoning: source: README.md and 47 packages spanning workflow, build, tools, and dev-general skills
plan-marshall.purpose_reasoning: Bundle providing skills, agents, and commands consumed by other bundles and users

skill:plan-marshall.description: Unified plan lifecycle management - the main entry point orchestrating phases 1-6

skill:tools-script-executor.description: Universal script execution via execute-script.py with notation-based routing

skill:manage-architecture.description: LLM-based architectural analysis transforming raw project data into enriched module metadata

skill:task-implementation.description: Domain-agnostic task execution with two-tier skill loading for implementation work

pm-dev-frontend.responsibility: Frontend development standards for JavaScript ES modules, modern patterns, CSS responsive design, JSDoc documentation, ESLint enforcement, and build tooling integration.
pm-dev-frontend.responsibility_reasoning: source: README.md and 6 packages covering JS/CSS skills
pm-dev-frontend.purpose_reasoning: Standards bundle providing frontend domain expertise

skill:javascript.description: Core JavaScript development standards covering ES modules, modern patterns, and async programming

skill:css.description: Modern CSS standards covering responsive design, quality practices, and tooling

pm-dev-frontend.key_dependencies_reasoning: Frontend bundle uses plan-marshall build and workflow infrastructure

pm-dev-frontend-cui.responsibility: CUI-specific JavaScript project standards extending pm-dev-frontend with Maven integration, Quarkus DevUI patterns, NiFi processor UI, and SonarQube configuration.
pm-dev-frontend-cui.responsibility_reasoning: source: README.md description and cui-javascript-project skill
pm-dev-frontend-cui.purpose_reasoning: CUI overlay bundle extending base frontend standards

skill:cui-javascript-project.description: CUI JavaScript project structure with Maven integration, dependency management, and build standards

pm-dev-frontend-cui.key_dependencies_reasoning: CUI frontend extends base frontend standards via plan-marshall-plugin

pm-dev-java.responsibility: Java development standards bundle covering core patterns, null safety (JSpecify), Lombok, CDI/Quarkus, JUnit 5 testing (unit, integration, Weld), JavaDoc, and Maven profile management. Includes agents for coverage analysis and standards verification.
pm-dev-java.responsibility_reasoning: source: README.md and 15 packages covering Java domain skills
pm-dev-java.purpose_reasoning: Standards bundle providing Java domain expertise for plan-marshall workflow

skill:java-core.description: Core Java development standards for patterns, modern features, and performance optimization

skill:junit-core.description: JUnit 5 core testing patterns with AAA structure, test organization, and coverage standards

skill:java-null-safety.description: JSpecify null safety annotations with @NullMarked, @Nullable, and package-level configuration

pm-dev-java.key_dependencies_reasoning: Java bundle uses plan-marshall build and workflow infrastructure

pm-dev-java-cui.responsibility: CUI-specific Java standards extending pm-dev-java with CuiLogger logging patterns, test data generators, value object contracts, HTTP client testing with MockWebServer, and LogRecord enforcement workflows.
pm-dev-java-cui.responsibility_reasoning: source: README.md and 7 packages covering CUI Java patterns
pm-dev-java-cui.purpose_reasoning: CUI overlay bundle extending base Java standards

skill:cui-logging.description: CUI logging standards with CuiLogger, LogRecord patterns, and DSL-style LogMessages

skill:cui-testing.description: CUI test library standards for test data generation, value object contracts, and JUL testing

pm-dev-java-cui.key_dependencies_reasoning: CUI Java extends base Java standards via plan-marshall-plugin

pm-dev-oci.responsibility: OCI container standards covering Dockerfile best practices, multi-platform builds, distroless images, runtime hardening, supply chain security, and OWASP container controls.
pm-dev-oci.responsibility_reasoning: source: README.md and 3 packages for OCI standards and security
pm-dev-oci.purpose_reasoning: Standards bundle providing container domain expertise

skill:oci-standards.description: General OCI container standards for image building, Dockerfiles, and multi-platform builds

skill:oci-security.description: OCI container security covering runtime hardening, supply chain security, and OWASP controls

pm-dev-python.responsibility: Python domain extension providing pyprojectx build operations and modern Python development best practices for the plan-marshall workflow.
pm-dev-python.purpose_reasoning: Standards bundle providing Python domain expertise

skill:python-best-practices.description: Modern Python development patterns and best practices

pm-documents.responsibility: Documentation standards bundle for AsciiDoc formatting, technical documentation quality, PlantUML architecture diagram verification, and content review orchestration.
pm-documents.responsibility_reasoning: source: README.md and 5 packages including asciidoc, documentation skills, and diagram commands
pm-documents.purpose_reasoning: Standards bundle providing documentation domain expertise

skill:ref-asciidoc.description: AsciiDoc formatting, validation, link verification, and template creation

skill:ref-documentation.description: Content quality, tone analysis, and review orchestration for technical documentation

pm-plugin-development.responsibility: Plugin development toolkit providing creation wizards, quality diagnosis (plugin-doctor), marketplace inventory scanning, architecture guidance, component maintenance, script development standards, and lesson management for marketplace components.
pm-plugin-development.responsibility_reasoning: source: README.md and 18 packages spanning creation, maintenance, and analysis skills/agents
pm-plugin-development.purpose_reasoning: Tooling bundle for marketplace component lifecycle management

skill:plugin-architecture.description: Architecture principles, skill patterns, and design guidance for building marketplace components

skill:plugin-doctor.description: Quality diagnosis and automated fixes for marketplace components

skill:plugin-create.description: Creation wizards for new marketplace components with proper structure and standards

pm-plugin-development.key_dependencies_reasoning: Plugin development relies on plan-marshall core for script execution and workflow

pm-requirements.responsibility: Requirements engineering standards for authoring SMART specifications, project planning with task tracking, traceability between specifications and implementation, and project initialization with proper directory structure.
pm-requirements.responsibility_reasoning: source: README.md and 6 packages covering requirements authoring, planning, traceability, and setup
pm-requirements.purpose_reasoning: Standards bundle providing requirements engineering expertise

skill:requirements-authoring.description: SMART requirements authoring with proper structure, integrity, and traceability

skill:traceability.description: Bidirectional linking between specifications and implementation code
